_comment: Maps URL patterns to access classification. Checked in order; first match wins.

rules.method: wget/curl direct download from the record page; find the files tab for .zip links
wget/curl from the download link on the figshare page
wget/curl; click 'Download' on the page to get the direct link
git clone or wget from GitHub releases
huggingface-cli download or git clone with lfs
rules.auth: Some datasets are gated: run `huggingface-cli login` first if access is denied

rules.method: gdown <file_id> or use the sharing link; for large files gdown handles the confirm page
OpenDataLab CLI: `odl get <dataset_name>`
OpenDataLab CLI: `odl get <dataset_name>`
kaggle API: `kaggle datasets download -d <owner/dataset>` or `kaggle competitions download -c <name>`
rules.auth:
1) Register at kaggle.com
2) Go to Account → API → Create New Token → download kaggle.json
3) Place kaggle.json in ~/.kaggle/
4) Accept dataset rules on the web page first if it's a competition

rules.method: Download from the Tianchi dataset page after login
rules.auth:
1) Register an Alibaba Cloud (Aliyun) account at tianchi.aliyun.com
2) Log in and open the dataset page
3) Click Download — some datasets require joining a competition first

rules.method: Download from the Heywhale dataset page after login
rules.auth:
1) Register at heywhale.com
2) Login and navigate to the dataset page
3) Click 'Download' or use their notebook environment

rules.method: Download from Baidu AI Studio after login
rules.auth:
1) Register a Baidu account
2) Login at aistudio.baidu.com
3) Navigate to the dataset page and click download

rules.method: Download from Grand Challenge after approval
rules.auth:
1) Register at grand-challenge.org
2) Navigate to the challenge/dataset page
3) Request access — some datasets grant instant access, others require organizer approval
4) Once approved, download via the provided link or AWS S3 bucket

rules.method: TCIA: use NBIA Data Retriever or direct REST API. Most collections are open access.
rules.auth:
1) Install NBIA Data Retriever: https://wiki.cancerimagingarchive.net/display/NBIA/NBIA+Data+Retriever+FAQ
2) Download the .tcia manifest file from the collection page
3) Open it with NBIA Data Retriever
Note: some collections marked 'Limited' require a TCIA account and data use agreement

rules.method: Same as cancerimagingarchive.net — use NBIA Data Retriever
Synapse CLI: `synapse get <syn_id> -r`
rules.auth:
1) Register at synapse.org
2) Navigate to the dataset and accept the data use conditions
3) Install synapseclient: `pip install synapseclient`
4) Login: `synapse login -u <email> -p <password>` or use auth token
5) Download: `synapse get <synID> -r`

rules.method: wget with PhysioNet credentials, or `wget -r -N -c -np` for open datasets
rules.auth:
1) Register at physionet.org
2) Some datasets require 'credentialed access': complete CITI training and sign DUA
3) Once approved: `wget -r -N -c -np --user <user> --ask-password https://physionet.org/files/<dataset>/<version>/`

rules.method: OpenNeuro CLI: `openneuro-cli download --snapshot <version> ds<number>` or AWS S3
rules.auth: No account needed for most datasets. For large datasets use: `aws s3 sync --no-sign-request s3://openneuro.org/ds<number> ds<number>/`

rules.method: Download from the NITRC project page
rules.auth: Some projects require a free NITRC account; register at nitrc.org if prompted

rules.method: Direct download via wget/curl from the Google Drive links listed on the page
Fill out the access request form on the Stanford ML Group page
rules.auth:
1) Visit the dataset page
2) Fill out the data use agreement form
3) You will receive a download link by email

rules.method: Apply through LONI IDA portal
rules.auth:
1) Apply at ida.loni.usc.edu — requires institutional affiliation
2) Submit data use application describing your research
3) Approval typically takes 1-2 weeks
4) Once approved, download via LONI IDA interface

rules.method: Apply through LONI IDA portal
rules.auth: Same as adni.loni.usc.edu: apply online, requires approval

rules.method: Register and download from OASIS project page or via XNAT Central
rules.auth:
1) Register at oasis-brains.org
2) Accept the data use agreement
3) Download via provided scripts or XNAT Central

rules.method: Apply through PPMI portal
rules.auth:
1) Register at ppmi-info.org
2) Submit a data use application
3) Approval required before access is granted

default.method: Visit the URL to check download options
default.auth: Access requirements could not be determined automatically. Please visit the dataset page to check.
